title: Caladenia aurulenta
uses: Caladenia aurulenta has been used in traditional medicine in Australia, where it is native, to treat various ailments. taxonomy: Caladenia aurulenta is a species of orchid native to Western Australia. It is classified under the family Orchidaceae and the genus Caladenia. The species is further divided into several subspecies, each with unique characteristics. Caladenia aurulenta is typically found in the southwestern region of Western Australia, where it grows in sandy soils and woodlands. The classification of Caladenia aurulenta helps in identifying and understanding its specific traits and habitats.
